title: Test Wrath of the Old Ones: 108-E01 MOVE_CARDS

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Return all primary creatures and magic cards to their original owner's deck (shuffle). Players then draw the same number of cards they sent.

effect.value: Move to owner deck and shuffle

plan.title: Test Wrath of the Old Ones: 108-E01 MOVE_CARDS
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Wrath of the Old Ones and verify that 108-E01 MOVE_CARDS resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: return all primary creatures and magic cards to their original owner deck, shuffle, then each player draws the same number they sent.
Pre-place each player primary creature and one field magic slot so the mass return branch has real targets.

steps: Player 1 plays Wrath of the Old Ones.
Return all primary creatures and field magic cards to their original owners deck and shuffle.
Verify the returned cards are no longer on the field.
manualVerification: Confirm returned cards go to original owner decks and those decks are shuffled.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
